title: Sprint Contract
description: Machine-readable acceptance criteria for a sprint. Created during planning, graded by autonomous sessions or /review command.

sprint.description: Sprint number (sequential within the contract set)

depends_on.description: Contract IDs that must be merged before this contract can execute (e.g., ['M02a', 'M01'])

layer.description: Primary layer(s) affected: go, frontend, python, db, tests, or combinations like go+frontend

description.description: What must be true for this criterion to pass

verification.description: How to verify — test command, manual check, or inspection

regression_gates.description: Regression test IDs that must pass (e.g., R-01, R-10)

critical.description: Must resolve before implementing — blocks code phase

high.description: Resolve when feasible — reviewer flags but doesn't block

medium.description: Document as known limitation if not resolved

design_review_rubric.description: Domain-specific design review criteria (supplements standard rubric)

quality_workflow.description: Slash commands to run in Phase 3 quality gates (e.g., ['/validate', '/simplify', '/validate', '/precommit'])

files_hint.description: Files likely to be created or modified (guidance, not prescriptive)

persona_review_required.description: Whether persona review is required for this sprint
